since_last: 63% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.68%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 63% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC -0.28% · Gold -1.34% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 63% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.68%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.68%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.24%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +4.26%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +4.26%, MU +3.86%, LSCC +3.35%, QCOM +2.04%, LRCX +2.02%. Laggards: SAP -1.98%, BABA -1.27%, PLTR -0.90%, NOW -0.74%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.70% at $157.2
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.70% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
